Petition For Determination Of Entitlement To Estate Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-29-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dylan Hyatt (via Court Call) for (petitioner) Sharon Jefferson.

The Court stated that this is a Heggstad petition filed in a Probate matter to transfer property to a trust, that this is not allowed and that it will need to be filed in the trust matter. Mr. Hyatt stated that they were trying to avoid that, that they will file it in Sacramento in the trust case and that his points & authorities established that it could be done in this court. The Court responded that the Heggstad petition must be filed in the trust case. Mr. Hyatt stated that the assigned Probate Referee, Warren Wong, has retired and they need another. The Court stated that it will inquire with the Probate Examiner and that the clerk will call him back with the information. The Petition for Determination of Entitlement to Estate Distribution is Denied.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

Subsequent to the hearing Mr. Hyatt was called and informed that he will need to submit a Request for Referee along with an Order for Referee.

Off Calendar Oct-03-2018 Continued To Oct-15-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney to appear on October 15, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear and why a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
